creator: kristinacors
caption: If you’re planning a trip to the Hamptons, watch until the end of this video for the name of this boutique hotel! #travelbucketlist #luxuryhotels #easthampton #besthotels #boutiquehotels

transcription.text: Where to stay in the Hamptons. If you're like me, even though you like to go to the Hamptons in the summer, this hotel in East Hampton might still have flown under the radar for you somehow. With its lush gardens and hysteria and beautiful outdoor pool, it's kind of hard not to fall in love with this place. It also has an intimate one-room spa. They offer exclusive sessions for up to two guests where you can relax in the hydro jacuzzi, rejuvenate in the eucalyptus steam shower, and swim against the current in the indoor pool. Spa access is $150 for guests and $200 for non-guests. The name of this hotel is the Baker House 1650. If you want to book a hotel room, click on the green location tag and you can book directly through this video, just like with TikTok Shop. Sometimes TikTok has better rates in there, so it's worth checking before you book. By the way, it's located in East Hampton and it's just a short walk from the town's shops, art galleries, and the beach. For more travel tips on what to do and where to stay in the Hamptons, check out my playlist below. And if you own a unique boutique hotel or a luxury hotel property and want me to visit your place next, email me and follow for more.
